_howToAdd.youtube: Add { "type": "youtube", "name": "Channel Name", "channelId": "UCxxxx", "transcript": true }. Find channelId by opening the channel page, View Source, and searching for "channelId". Set transcript:false to save Supadata credits (uses the video description instead).
_howToAdd.blog: Add { "type": "blog", "name": "Blog Name", "url": "https://site.com/feed" }. Most blogs expose an RSS/Atom feed at /feed, /rss, or /atom.xml.
_howToAdd.x: Zara's feed is a fixed list of 26 builders. Following someone NOT on that list needs a paid X API + a new adapter — ask Claude.
